emails.subject: RE: Forms
emails.body: RE: Forms good, I have some direct meters forms that are under tolerance. Not a big deal, I simply signed them without looking at them. PL

emails.subject: RE: Forms
emails.body: Thanks. Let me know if and when they get out of hand again. I am reviewing the majority of forms now myself before they go to you. The bad ones go back to Settlements, good ones go to Risk.

emails.subject: RE: Forms
emails.body: RE: Forms ed brady and james hungerford are working on east stuff To: Winfree, O'Neal D.; Love, Phillip M.; Keiser, Kam; Palmer, B. Scott

emails.subject: RE: Forms
emails.body: RE: Forms yep...you knew i would To: Keiser, Kam; Palmer, B. Scott; Love, Phillip M.; Winfree, O'Neal D.
